dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Mirabegron extended-release tablets and mirabegron for extended-release oral suspension are two different products and they are not substitutable on a milligram-per-milligram basis. Select the recommended product (mirabegron extended-release tablets or mirabegron for extended-release oral suspension) based on the indication.
